title: Erroneous: Delhi High Court on trial court observations in excise policy discharge verdict
description: The Delhi High Court on Monday observed that some of the observations made by the trial court while discharging Arvind Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia, K Kavitha and 20 others in the Delhi excise policy case were "erroneous". Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma gave a prima facie finding that the observations made by the trial court regarding statements of the witnesses and the approvers appear to be erroneous at the stage of framing of the charge.
